controls.abstention_policy: Gan 6-month seizure-free threshold; use no seizure frequency reference only when no seizure frequency information is present

hypothesis: A capped GEPA compile pass with semantic_frequency_with_evidence_feedback improves monthly/Purist accuracy versus semantic BootstrapFewShot and verify-repair v2 without prompt-bloat regression or evidence-support loss.
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
The GEPA feedback metric semantic_frequency_with_evidence_feedback is optimizer-facing only and does not replace gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring.
Report selected GEPA instruction length and compile/prediction latency alongside label metrics.
Compare against verify-repair v2 and semantic bootstrap on the same capped validation slice before any full validation.
This capped validation config is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
